articles.title: Nuclear Risk Rising! Beijing Unleashes Scathing Attack On US Military Expansion
articles.description: The world is facing its most fragile strategic moment since the Cold War. In a powerful address at the Shangri-La Dialogue, Chinese Major General Meng Xiangqing dropped a massive warning to the West, stating that the risk of global nuclear war is no longer remote. Blasting the U.S.-led AUKUS pact for fueling nuclear proliferation and hammering Japan for trying to rewrite its pacifist constitution, Meng warned that a complete lack of dialogue has left a dangerous vacuum. Even more terrifyingly, he cautioned that unchecked military AI could fast turn 'Terminator' scenarios into reality. Watch China’s fierce pushback.

articles.title: Visa Overstayers Caught: Delhi Police Crack Down on Bangladeshi Nationals after tip off
articles.description: Delhi police apprehended five Bangladeshi nationals for overstaying their visas. The arrests followed a tip about suspicious individuals speaking Bangla. The group had arrived in Delhi from Bangladesh and planned to travel to Greece for employment. They remained in Delhi beyond their visa validity, awaiting job offers. Efforts are underway to apprehend an associate who assisted them.

articles.title: Odisha Accident: Dumper Hits Car in Bhubaneswar, Drags Vehicle for 200 Meters
articles.description: A serious road accident has been reported from Bhubaneswar, Odisha, where a dumper truck allegedly rammed into a car after the driver was not given way. The impact of the collision was so severe that the dumper reportedly dragged the car for nearly 200 meters, putting the car driver’s life in danger. According to initial reports, the dumper driver fled the scene immediately after the accident, leaving the injured and damaged vehicle behind. Police have reached the spot and launched a search operation to trace the absconding driver. The incident has raised concerns over reckless driving and road safety in the area. A video footage of the accident has also surfaced, showing the extent of the damage caused during the collision. Authorities are investigating the matter and reviewing the footage to identify further details and ensure action against the accused driver.

articles.title: 'Part of process': RSS downplays Cockroach Janata Party buzz, says Gen Z has tremendous faith in India
articles.description: RSS Prachar Pramukh Sunil Ambekar downplayed concerns about the satirical "Cockroach Janata Party" (CJP), stating that open debate and differing views are normal in a democratic society. He emphasized India's aware populace, transparent elections, free media, and active public discourse, asserting that institutions and political parties are capable of handling such discussions independently.

articles.title: Weekly Numerology Horoscope (1st June - 7th June, 2026): A Powerful Week of Growth, Confidence & New Opportunities
articles.description: Week 23 of 2026 arrives with a fresh and dynamic vibration that pushes people toward action, confidence, and practical movement. After weeks of emotional healing and inner reflection, the energy now becomes faster, clearer, and more goal-oriented. This week carries strong vibrations of new beginnings, leadership, career focus, financial planning, and rebuilding personal motivation. Many people may suddenly feel more energetic, ambitious, and mentally active. Situations that were delayed earlier may begin moving quickly now. The universe is encouraging you to stop doubting yourself and start taking practical steps toward your future.

articles.title: Spanish Proverb of the Day: "Tell me who you hang out with, and I'll tell you who..." Want to know your future? Look at the people around you — this timeless Spanish proverb reveals why your circle shapes your character, choices, and destiny
articles.description: Spanish Proverb of the Day: “Tell me who you hang out with, and I’ll tell you who...” reveals a timeless truth about human behavior, friendship, influence, and personal growth. This powerful Spanish proverb explains how social circles shape mindset, habits, success, and emotional health. People slowly absorb the energy around them. Wise company builds character. Toxic company destroys peace. In today’s fast-moving world, this deep life lesson feels more relevant, transformational, and emotionally important than ever.
